# Two-Factor Authentication

[[Two-Factor Authentication]] (2FA) can be activated by customers through the security section of their profile settings. Users have the option to utilize either an authenticator app or receive a code via text message. After enabling 2FA, a second factor will be needed only when signing in on a new device or after thirty days on a trusted device, allowing for seamless routine access on personal computers.

[Source: account_security.md#two-factor-authentication]
